realm.name: admin
realm.description: System administrator (IT, Keycloak, Docker, API keys)

clients.name: SchoolFlow Admin API (service account)
clients.description: Confidential client used by the NestJS API to call the Keycloak Admin REST API (user listing, role management, link/unlink). Service account is granted realm-management roles via the synthetic service-account-schoolflow-admin-api user below.
